tiles.interactText: Restricted civic access lane.
A sealed berth with faded smuggler markings.
A confiscation lockbox forgotten during the panic.
A split cargo crate lies open. Nobody is coming back for it.
A stamped cargo crate with a busted latch.
A maintenance grate hangs open just enough for a careful crawl.

transition.text: You descend into the lower vents.

actors.name: Dock Scav
actors.bio: Just trying to survive the station shift.
ambientDialogue: Dax digs through salvage with one eye on the catwalk.

actors.name: Civic Enforcer
ambientDialogue: Officer Merik keeps one hand near his sidearm.

actors.name: Naia Voss
actors.bio: Station fixer with a perfect memory for debt and insult.
ambientDialogue: Naia watches the dock like she is pricing every mistake in sight.

actors.name: Patch-Lan
actors.bio: A freelance medic deciding who is worth saving today.
ambientDialogue: Patch-Lan keeps triage supplies sorted by likelihood of screaming.
"If you are not bleeding yet, good. Keep it that way," Patch-Lan says.

tiles.interactText: Bunks for crew rest. Safe zone for long rests.
Galley station. Eventually craft better meals here.
A bolted galley locker that still smells like broth concentrate.
A cargo crate of ship tools and tagged bypass spines.
Navigation table tied to sector travel.
A cargo hatch leads into a hidden hold behind the false bulkhead.

transition.text: You duck into the hidden hold.

actors.name: Cargo Drone L3M
actors.bio: A battered shipboard cargo drone that sounds tired despite lacking lungs.
ambientDialogue: Cargo Drone L3M clicks irritably at unsecured freight.

tiles.interactText: A cracked supply locker half buried in ash.
A half-buried supply pod from a cracked convoy.

actors.name: Boss Krail
actors.bio: A dust-ridge tyrant pretending to be a king.
ambientDialogue: Boss Krail spits black dust and sizes you up like salvage.

actors.name: Sera Flint
actors.bio: A local scout who knows the ridge paths better than the raiders do.

tiles.interactText: A relic shrine still hums beneath the waterline.
A sealed archive hatch stands ajar beneath leaking conduit light.

transition.text: You push into the archive annex.

tiles.interactText: A waterlogged transit niche full of calcified offerings.

actors.name: Reef Watcher
actors.bio: One of the few locals still willing to speak to offworlders.
ambientDialogue: The Reef Watcher keeps glancing toward the flooded archive door.

tiles.interactText: A debtor locker with civic burn marks and a half-melted tag.
A maintenance cache crammed with emergency stores.
The climb back to the drydock is unpleasant but possible.

transition.text: You climb back into the drydock.

actors.name: Orin Pike
actors.bio: A vent runner with survival instincts and flexible loyalties.

tiles.interactText: A false-floor stash hidden under magnetic struts.
A sealed locker tagged with obsolete reactor warnings.
A ladder returns to the main cargo deck.

transition.text: You climb back to the cargo deck.

tiles.interactText: A reliquary of preserved transit relics.
A trunk of salvage notes and transit tags.
The hatch opens back toward the flooded basin.

transition.text: You return to the basin walkway.

actors.name: Archivist Pell
actors.bio: Keeper of the annex records and reluctant broker of old transit truths.
